metaTitle: Commands — Prosperity | Loot Overhaul for Minecraft
metaDescription: Command reference for Prosperity. Every /prosperity subcommand with permission level, usage, and example output.
ogDescription: Full command reference for /prosperity with permissions and examples.
title: Commands
lede: Everything lives under the /prosperity root. Permission level 0 = any player; level 2 = operator.

rows: /prosperity info
0
Show your loot scaling tier for your current position (distance, tier, multipliers)
/prosperity info <player>
2
Show another player's loot scaling tier at their position
/prosperity stats
0
Show your loot statistics: containers looted, per-tier breakdown, distinct structure types, and injected rewards received
/prosperity stats <player>
2
Show another player's loot statistics
/prosperity reset <pos>
2
Clear all instanced loot data for the container at the given position
/prosperity reset <pos> <player>
2
Clear a specific player's instanced loot at the given position
/prosperity reset around [radius] [player]
2
Clear instanced loot for every container within radius blocks of you (default 128, max 256), optionally for one player
/prosperity refresh <pos>
2
Force a loot refresh for the container at the given position (all players)
/prosperity refresh <pos> <player>
2
Force a loot refresh for a specific player at the given position
/prosperity refresh around [radius] [player]
2
Force a loot refresh for every container within radius blocks of you (default 128, max 256), optionally for one player
/prosperity reload
2
Reload config from disk and sync to all connected clients

body.code: Distance: 4,521 blocks — Wilderness tier (2.0x stacks, +2 quality)

body.html: Counts are recorded when loot is generated for you — first opens and refresh re-rolls, never return visits. Output:

body.code:
Loot stats for rfizzle:
Containers looted: 42
  Local: 10
  Frontier: 20
  Wilderness: 12
Distinct structure types looted: 7
Injected rewards received: 5
Cleared instanced loot at [x, y, z] for all players (4 instances removed)

body.html: Clears instanced loot for every container in loaded chunks within 128 blocks (default; max 256), so each re-rolls on next open and its unlooted sparkle returns. Output:

body.code: Refreshed loot within 128 blocks for all players (37 instances cleared)

body.html: Re-reads config/prosperity.json and pushes updated values to every connected client without a restart.

items.title: Level 0 — Any Player
html: info and stats (self) are available to all players — they can view their own loot tier and statistics.

items.title: Level 2 — Operator
html: Viewing other players' tiers or stats, resetting instanced loot, and reloading config require op level 2.

items.title: Permissions Mods
html: With a permissions mod (e.g. LuckPerms), nodes follow the pattern prosperity.command.<subcommand>.
